---


---

<h1 id="2021-cell-数据整理"><span class="prefix"></span><span class="content">2021 CELL 数据整理</span><span class="suffix"></span></h1>
<h2 id="step-1.-读取excel"><span class="prefix"></span><span class="content">step 1. 读取Excel</span><span class="suffix"></span></h2>
<p>读取结果表和链接表(连接序列与oligo_id、mpra_variant_id)</p>
<pre><code>result_df = pd.read_excel("mmc1.xlsx", sheet_name="Variant MPRAu Results")
info_df = pd.read_excel("mmc1.xlsx", sheet_name="Oligo Variant Info")
</code></pre>
<h2 id="step-2.-根据-oligo-variant-info-info_df-建立简洁的链接表"><span class="prefix"></span><span class="content">step 2. 根据 Oligo Variant Info (info_df) 建立简洁的链接表</span><span class="suffix"></span></h2>
<h4 id="oligo-variant-info-是连接-fasta-数据和variant-mprau-results的桥梁"><span class="prefix"></span><span class="content">Oligo Variant Info 是连接 fasta 数据和Variant MPRAu Results的桥梁</span><span class="suffix"></span></h4>
<p>Oligo Variant Info (info_df)的oligo_id列对应fasta的Header，mpra_variant_id列对应Variant MPRAu Results的mpra_variant_id列；<br>
提取 oligo_id，mpra_variant_id，tag (re/alt)， gene_symbols</p>
<pre><code>info_keep = info_df[
	[
		"oligo_id",
		"mpra_variant_id",
		"tag",
		"gene_symbols"
	]
].copy()
print("链接表结构:", info_keep.shape)
print("链接表前5行:", info_keep.head())
print("检查 info_keep 中 oligo_id 是否唯一", info_keep["oligo_id"].duplicated().sum())
</code></pre>
<p><img alt="输入图片说明" src="data:image/png;base64,"></p>
<h2 id="step-3.-根据fasta文件建立序列表"><span class="prefix"></span><span class="content">step 3. 根据fasta文件建立序列表</span><span class="suffix"></span></h2>
<p>将fasta文件的Header与sequence变成表格的oligo_id与sequence</p>
<pre><code>seq_records = []
for fasta_file in ["ENCFF090JTW.fasta.gz", "ENCFF770UJN.fasta.gz"]:
	with gzip.open(fasta_file, "rt") as handle:
			for record in SeqIO.parse(handle, "fasta"):
					header_ids = record.id.split("/")
					for oid in header_ids:
							seq_records.append(
									{"oligo_id": oid.strip(),
									"sequence": str(record.seq)
									}
							)
seq_df = pd.DataFrame(seq_records)
print("去重前序列表结构:", seq_df.shape)
print("序列表前5行:", seq_df.head())

print(f"\n检查去重前是否存在重复的oligo_id...", seq_df["oligo_id"].duplicated().sum())
print(f"检查去重前是否存在重复的sequence...", seq_df["sequence"].duplicated().sum())
</code></pre>
<p><img alt="输入图片说明" src="data:image/png;base64,"></p>
<h4 id="对两个fasta文件合并后的同种序列进行去重"><span class="prefix"></span><span class="content">对两个fasta文件合并后的同种序列进行去重</span><span class="suffix"></span></h4>
<pre><code>seq_df = seq_df.drop_duplicates(subset=["oligo_id", "sequence"])
print("去重后序列表结构:", seq_df.shape)

dup = seq_df.groupby("oligo_id")["sequence"].nunique()
print("每个oligo_id对应的sequence数量:", dup.value_counts())
print("存在多个sequence的oligo_id:", dup[dup &gt; 1])

print(f"\n检查去重后是否存在重复的oligo_id...", seq_df["oligo_id"].duplicated().sum())
print(f"检查去重后是否存在重复的sequence...", seq_df["sequence"].duplicated().sum())
</code></pre>
<p><img alt="输入图片说明" src="data:image/png;base64,"></p>
<h5 id="这里依旧存在重复oligo_id是因为两个文件相同-oligo_id-的具体序列不一样"><span class="prefix"></span><span class="content">这里依旧存在重复oligo_id是因为两个文件相同 oligo_id 的具体序列不一样</span><span class="suffix"></span></h5>
<h5 id="存在重复sequence是因为有些-oligo_id-的序列一样"><span class="prefix"></span><span class="content">存在重复sequence是因为有些 oligo_id 的序列一样</span><span class="suffix"></span></h5>
<h2 id="step-4.-variant-mprau-results转长表"><span class="prefix"></span><span class="content">step 4. Variant MPRAu Results转长表</span><span class="suffix"></span></h2>
<p>将结果文件的六个细胞系结果都单独变成一行，每个细胞系提取log2FoldChange_Skew和padj。</p>
<pre><code>cell_lines = ["HEK293FT", "HEPG2", "HMEC", "K562", "GM12878", "SKNSH"]
long_list = []
for cell in cell_lines:
		tmp = result_df[
				["mpra_variant_id",
					f"log2FoldChange_Skew_{cell}",
					f"padj_Skew_{cell}"
				]
		].copy()
		
		tmp.columns = [
				"mpra_variant_id",
				"log2FoldChange_Skew",
				"padj"
		]
		
		tmp["cell_lines"] = cell
		long_list.append(tmp)
		
mpra_long = pd.concat(long_list, ignore_index=True)

print("Variant MPRAu Results表结构:", mpra_long.shape)
print("Variant MPRAu Results表前5行:", mpra_long.head())
</code></pre>
<p><img alt="输入图片说明" src="data:image/png;base64,"></p>
<h2 id="step-5.-将结果长表和链接表info_keep合并"><span class="prefix"></span><span class="content">step 5. 将结果长表和链接表info_keep合并</span><span class="suffix"></span></h2>
<p>按照结果长表的mpra_variant_id进行合并。</p>
<pre><code>mpra_info = mpra_long.merge(
		info_keep,
		on="mpra_variant_id",
		how="left"
)

# 检查oligo_id是否有缺失
print(f"检查是否有info没有匹配上...", mpra_info["oligo_id"].isna().sum())
print("mpra_info.shape:", mpra_info.shape)
print("前5行:", mpra_info.head())
</code></pre>
<p><img alt="输入图片说明" src="data:image/png;base64,"></p>
<h2 id="step-6.-将生成的mpra_info和fasta合并成最终数据集"><span class="prefix"></span><span class="content">step 6. 将生成的mpra_info和fasta合并成最终数据集</span><span class="suffix"></span></h2>
<p>按照mpra_info的oligo_id列进行合并。</p>
<pre><code>final_df = mpra_info.merge(
		seq_df,
		on="oligo_id",
		how="left"
)
# 调整顺序
final_df = final_df[
	["sequence", "tag", "log2FoldChange_Skew", "padj", 
	"gene_symbols", "mpra_variant_id", "oligo_id", "cell_lines"]
]
print(f"\n最终数据集形状:", final_df.shape)
print("最终数据集前5行:", final_df.head())
</code></pre>
<p><img alt="输入图片说明" src="data:image/png;base64,"></p>
<h4 id="找出-final_df-中重复次数--6-的-oligo_id"><span class="prefix"></span><span class="content">找出 final_df 中重复次数 &gt; 6 的 oligo_id</span><span class="suffix"></span></h4>
<p>按理来说六个细胞系oligo_id是重复6次，如果大于6次说明在fasta文件里一种oligo_id存在多种sequence。</p>
<pre><code>oligo_counts = final_df["oligo_id"].value_counts()
# 出现次数大于6的 oligo_id
dup_oligos = oligo_counts[oligo_counts &gt; 6]
print(f"\n重复数量 &gt;6 的 oligo_id 数量：{len(dup_oligos)}")
print("\n这些 oligo_id 及其出现次数：", dup_oligos)
</code></pre>
<p><img alt="输入图片说明" src="data:image/png;base64,"><br>
对于这里5对oligo_id进行的了人工检查，最终可用3种。具体情况在word。</p>
<h4 id="找出-sequence-缺失的行"><span class="prefix"></span><span class="content">找出 sequence 缺失的行</span><span class="suffix"></span></h4>
<pre><code>missing_seq_df = final_df[final_df["sequence"].isna()]
print("缺失 sequence 的行数：", len(missing_seq_df))
# 查看对应的 oligo_id 和 mpra_variant_id
print(missing_seq_df[["oligo_id", "mpra_variant_id"]])
</code></pre>
<p><img alt="输入图片说明" src="data:image/png;base64,"></p>
